directConversionMeasuresBuyersPurchaseCo: Direct Conversion Rate refers to the ratio of buyers who eventually purchased the advertised product after clicking the ad. advertisingMeasuresRevenueAdvertisingCos: Return on ad spend (ROAS) measures how much revenue is generated by your ad relative to the cost of the ad.
